scope: supported-IID oracle-composition assignment and qualified P1 lattice exposure into the current full-from-prior conditional-coordinate sampler

evaluation.common_noise_contract: one shared coordinate prior and reset-identical Brownian generator for all four arms
evaluation.panel_selection: one lexicographically first supported-action iid_test carrier per material, material IDs sorted, capped at 18 before sampling

decision_rule.pass: qualify only the bounded supported-IID generated-side coordinate exposure and permit the preregistered GaugeFlow-base capacity screen
decision_rule.fail: stop before capacity scaling and joint pretraining; classify full-prior, assignment, lattice, or interaction failure without changing thresholds
decision_rule.boundary: This Gate uses oracle composition and a supported-IID parent-carrier subset. It cannot qualify generated composition, unseen parent actions, free joint M1, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT. No paired endpoint RMS is defined for a generated lattice.
